name: Postmark
description: Postmark is a transactional email API focused on reliable, fast delivery. It is designed specifically for application-generated emails like password resets, welcome emails, and notifications. Postmark provides detailed delivery stats, bounce tracking, template management, and message search with industry-leading delivery speeds.

capabilities.name: send_email
capabilities.description: Send a single transactional email with HTML and/or plain text body, attachments, open and link tracking, and metadata.

capabilities.name: send_email_template
capabilities.description: Send an email using a pre-defined template with dynamic variables. Templates let you separate email content from code and support layouts.

capabilities.name: get_delivery_stats
capabilities.description: Retrieve aggregate delivery statistics including sent counts, bounces, spam complaints, open rates, and click rates over a date range.

capabilities.name: search_outbound
capabilities.description: Search and retrieve outbound messages with filters for recipient, sender, status, subject, tag, date range, and metadata.

capabilities.name: manage_templates
capabilities.description: Create, list, update, and delete email templates. Templates support HTML and text bodies, subject lines, and can be organized with aliases and layout templates.
